name: Rum Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box butter cake mix, any brand
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake batter using one box of any brand butter cake mix.
2. Substitute an equivalent amount of light rum for water in the recipe.
3. Add 1 stick of butter and 3 eggs to the batter.
4. Bake according to package instructions.
Cake from FL (ICES Member)
Busted by Barb @ Possum Kingdom
